Priya Verma
Reviewed on 28 Oct 2023

The decoration was absolutely stunning! The team arrived on time and completely transformed our living room for my daughter's 1st birthday. Highly recommended!

Reviewed on 15 Sep 2023

Good decoration but they were 30 minutes late. Overall the setup looked nice for our anniversary.

Your Reply
16 Sep 2023

Hi Amit, thank you for your feedback. We apologize for the slight delay due to heavy traffic. We are glad you liked the final setup!
